plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-500 RP16.P06.M03.S11-RP16.P06.M05.S06 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-500 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP16.P06 implementation workflow slice: the M03 Primary Implementation Slice tail (the twelve remaining rows), the full M04 Secondary Workflow Slice cycle (twenty-two rows), and the M05 Permission And Audit Binding head (the first six rows) as three descriptor-only sections over 40 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H16), Claude review packet (C16), and CP00-501 handoff, without opening governance, DLP, legal hold, or retention runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-500 is a clean, internally consistent descriptor-only governance closeout pack (RP16.P06.M03.S11-RP16.P06.M05.S06, 40 units, risk B), independently verified read-only via Read/Grep/Glob. (1) Coverage: counting the manifest/baseline included_units directly yields ui=8, claude_review=2, security_audit=9, test=8, implementation=13 = 40, and micro-titles Primary Implementation Slice=12 / Secondary Workflow Slice=22 / Permission And Audit Binding=6 = 40 — matching the prompt baseline, registry GOVERNANCE_CORE_CP500_REQUIREMENTS, contract p06_implementation_workflow_slice_descriptor, plan binding, and review-baseline exactly. (2) Cross-reference integrity: registry GOVERNANCE_CORE_CP500_PACK_BINDING, contract current_pack, closeout-pack-plan.json CP00-500, and the baseline source_plan_pack all agree on pack_id, risk_class B, unit_count 40, range, upstream CP00-499, next CP00-501, and next_subphase RP16.P06.M05.S07; the validator script deep-equals contract<->registry projections. (3) No-write/no-real-data boundary confirmed at code level: freezeCp500Result forces writes_product_state=false, no_real_data=true, synthetic_only=true and all governance/DLP/retention/legal-hold/permission/audit dispatch+write flags false, every descriptor row is descriptor_only=true/runtime_execution=false/customer_safe_errors_only=true/raw_payload_included=false, and a repo grep shows zero fs/network/child_process/process.env/fetch usage anywhere in packages/governance/src (pure frozen-object construction). (4) No production-readiness over-claim: manifest production_ready=false, runtime_ready=false, status implemented_pending_review, all 40 units implemented_pending_review, and production_ready_candidate is correctly gated on coverage.valid && slice.valid; the production_ready gate is not weakened. (5) Authority boundary enforced in code, tests, and contract: claude_is_final_approval=false, local_validation_claims_enterprise_trust=false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening=true, promotes_claude_to_final_approval=false, claims_enterprise_trust_from_local_validation=false; the review run is read_only=true with tools Read,Grep,Glob and forbidden_tools_present=false, so Claude remains a read-only independent reviewer and not the final approver. (6) Hermes patterns are used only for the deterministic evidence-packet/Claude-review-packet descriptor (H16.CP00-500..., receipt_shape descriptor_only..._no_write, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt=false, hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product=false), not product runtime. (7) CP178+ review hardening: readiness auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1456-byte stdout, valid JSON {\"ok\":true}), validation-report shows prompt_contains_full_diff_or_source=false, summary_only_review_allowed=false (correct for Risk B with security/audit + review-evidence deliverables), active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted=[], and invalid_attempts_preserved=[]; there is no auth failure, 0-byte, malformed, fenced-with-prose, tool-call-shaped, or missing-field review evidence to reject. (8) Scope hygiene: dedicated CP00-500 tests assert coverage, descriptor-only rows, and authority boundaries, and command-evidence records node --test, npm test, npm run validate/build, all gate validators, and git diff --check at exit 0; unrelated dirty UI-workstream, workbook, and LDIP invalid-attempt files are correctly excluded from active_pack_implementation_refs, and docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md is an out-of-scope untracked planning doc whose current content contains no embedded system-reminder injection vector. The post-review artifacts (claude-review-result.json, adjudication.md, construction-inspection.json, raw-output.json, review-receipt.json) are correctly absent because they are produced by this review and the post-review gated commands. No findings; this review does not block pack or goal closeout.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-500 governance core p06 implementation workflow slice descriptor pack
